title: Prosecutors claim 40TB of data linked to D4vd includes child pornography in shocking court update
summary_full: Prosecutors unveiled a staggering 40 terabytes of evidence against D4vd, including disturbing claims of illegal child-related material found on his devices. The rapper faces serious charges, including murder and abuse of a minor, though he maintains his innocence. His defense team vows to contest the prosecution's narrative, which alleges a relationship with a girl under 14.
